purpose: Provide a concrete human review packet for the future PKG-01 physical recovery candidate without authorizing or executing writes.

required_signoff_checklist.description: Every card_print_id in this packet has been reviewed against the before and proposed fields.
Source URLs/evidence sources have been reviewed for every proposed row.
A fresh production before-state snapshot will be captured immediately before any future execution.
Rollback values will be regenerated from the fresh snapshot, not copied from this packet.
A separate dry-run-default transactional execution artifact must exist before any write.
Post-apply verification must run inside the future transaction before commit.

explicit_non_authorizations: This packet is not operator approval.
This packet is not an execution artifact.
This packet must not be copied into a migration.
This packet does not allow DB writes.
This packet does not allow cleanup, quarantine, hiding, insertion, or deletion.

current_fields.name: Team Galactic's Invention G-107 Technical Machine

proposed_fields.name: Team Galactic's Invention G-107 Technical Machine

rollback_fields_from_snapshot.name: Team Galactic's Invention G-107 Technical Machine
